title: Clothing, Fashion, and Sustainability Game Zone

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: The repetition of the same sound at the beginning of several words in a sentence or phrase.
choices: alliteration
rhythm
figurative
rounds.answer: alliteration
rounds.explanation: alliteration: The repetition of the same sound at the beginning of several words in a sentence or phrase.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: The feelings or ideas that a word makes you think of, beyond its basic meaning.
choices: alliteration
rhythm
connotation
rounds.answer: connotation
rounds.explanation: connotation: The feelings or ideas that a word makes you think of, beyond its basic meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A strong statement that something is true.
choices: rhythm
assertion
alliteration
rounds.answer: assertion
rounds.explanation: assertion: A strong statement that something is true.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

choices: A way of comparing two things using the words "like" or "as".
A way of describing something non-human by giving it human qualities.
The feelings or ideas that a word makes you think of, beyond its basic meaning.
Words that create pictures in your mind by describing things in vivid detail.
rounds.answer: A way of comparing two things using the words "like" or "as".
rounds.explanation: "Her smile was as bright as the sun" is a simile.

choices: A way of describing something by saying it is something else, to show a similarity.

rounds.answer: A way of describing something by saying it is something else, to show a similarity.
rounds.explanation: In the sentence "Time is a thief," the word "thief" is a metaphor.

choices: A way of describing something non-human by giving it human qualities.

rounds.answer: A way of describing something non-human by giving it human qualities.
rounds.explanation: "The wind whispered secrets to the trees" is an example of personification.
